round2_improvement_notes.linguistic: Agent correctly used cross-agent evidence to eliminate other English-speaking countries (US, Canada, UK) and refine its confidence to high for Australia.
round2_improvement_notes.landscape: Agent synthesized botanical and regulatory evidence to reinforce its initial high-confidence assessment.
round2_improvement_notes.botanics: Agent synthesized landscape and regulatory evidence to confirm the endemic nature of the flora and the location.
round2_improvement_notes.regulatory: Agent synthesized botanical and linguistic evidence to confirm the location context for the road markings.
round2_improvement_notes.meta: Agent synthesized landscape and botanical evidence to confirm the regional profile.

verdict.judge_synthesis_notes: The judge correctly identified the convergence of all agents on Australia. The synthesis explicitly lists the specific evidence (Eucalyptus, red soil, white edge lines) that supports the conclusion and correctly notes the absence of contradictory constraints.
